inputs.job_description:
As a student, you work with your colleagues on an equal footing and create ideal conditions for your future career. Step out of your comfort zone, excel and redefine the limits of what is possible. That’s just what our employees are doing every single day – in order to set the pace through our innovations and enable outstanding achievements. After all, behind every successful company are many great fascinating people. In a spacious modern setting full of opportunities for further development, ZEISS employees work in a place where expert knowledge and team spirit reign supreme. All of this is supported by a special ownership structure and the long-term goal of the Carl Zeiss Foundation: to bring science and society into the future together. Join us today. Inspire people tomorrow. Diversity is a part of ZEISS. We look forward to receiving your application regardless of gender, nationality, ethnic and social origin, religion, philosophy of life, disability, age, sexual orientation or identity. Apply now! It takes less than 10 minutes.
Your role
Seeing beyond - future of medical technology
For more than 100 years, ZEISS medical technology has been driving progress in ophthalmology and microsurgery. In ophthalmology, our solutions help to maintain and improve people's vision at every stage of their lives. In microsurgery, our solutions enable targeted interventions on diseased tissue so that small and sensitive organs continue to function optimally.
Medical technology from ZEISS supports medical professionals in improving the lives of patients worldwide. The fact that our actions have a direct impact on people's well-being is what drives us every d
Your Role
With us, you have the opportunity to perfectly combine your studies with practical experience while actively contributing to exciting projects. This allows you to gain valuable skills, expand your network, and grow both professionally and personally.
Supporting the advanced development team on a variety of projects that entail design, manufacturing, and testing of prototypes necessary to arrive at proof of concept for a novel eye implant technology
Support in laboratory work incl. sample manufacturing in laboratory settings, optical and mechanical testing and characterization of millimeter sized objects
In addition, a fundamental part of the job is the analysis of the data obtained through testing with the support of software programs such as Phyton, Matlab, Origin.
Scientific literature research
Your profile
Ongoing studies in the field of natural science and engineering, preferably with affinity for lab work and analytical mindset
Knowledge of data analysis programs and programming skills in Python (recommended), knowledge in MATLAB or Mathematica is an advantage
Knowledge in computer-assisted design with Creo Parametric is a plus
Crafty and Creative personality
Tech-savvy and high curiosity about technology capabilities
Strong analytical skills
Fluent in English, German is an advantage
Clear and structured communication skills in written (presentations and reports)
Proactive attitude
Ability to work on site in Berlin
Sounds exciting? Then become part of #teamZEISS and help us shape the future! Please provide your complete application documents (CV, certificates, etc.).
Contact
Falk Dymke

inputs.location: Berlin, Germany
inputs.job_description:
Introduction
Whether they’re being made in the boardroom or the courtroom, good decisions rely on good evidence. Understanding what data to collect, how to analyse it, and how to draw out the relevant insights is vital to providing evidence that decision-makers can rely on.
Our team has extensive experience of providing data-led causal and predictive insights using methods from the fields of econometrics, statistics, data science, simulation and experimental design. Our multidisciplinary approach enables us to harness the best of these methods and apply our expertise in numerous sectors and geographies.
Your role in the team
As a Data Scientist intern, you will play a pivotal role in supporting Oxera projects and business development initiatives across our products, sectors, and geographies. You will be required to do the following.
Collaborate closely with colleagues and clients to resolve complex issues together by developing data science products and solutions.
Build datasets, validate data, implement causal inference or predictive methods from the data science toolbox, and present your work with impactful and interactive visuals and reports.
What we’re looking for
A well-established understanding of data science methods for causal and/or predictive analysis.
An excellent academic record, with an undergraduate or postgraduate degree in a quantitative field, for example computer science, mathematics, or data science, with a significant focus on using data science methods for causal inference and/or prediction.
A solid background in other analytics fields, e.g. econometrics, is a plus. If a relevant degree is not available, a proven track record of robust, reliable and insightful data analysis with a focus on implementation of data science methods for causal inference and/or prediction is a must have.
We offer
Locations: Berlin, London or Oxford
Duration: 3–6+ months, year round
We strongly believe in the positive potential of AI and actively support its responsible use in the workplace. However, applications that use AI to generate a cover letter will be rejected, and the use of AI during any interviews or written exams will also result in rejection.
A highly competitive salary.
An opportunity to make an impact and shape the economics landscape by working with regulators, state departments, competition authorities, law firms and other private clients and stakeholders.
A supportive, multicultural work environment, with the option of employee mobility.
A collaborative working environment, with client exposure from day one.
The opportunity to work with some of the brightest and most experienced minds in the industry.
A structured career path, with ongoing training, mentorship and development opportunities to help you grow.
A commitment to fostering an inclusive workplace where diversity is celebrated and everyone is empowered to contribute.
Oxera is an equal opportunities employer and values diversity at all levels of the organisation. We encourage applications from all qualified candidates regardless of race, gender, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age.
Contact
Please note: you may only apply for one position with us, so take the time to consider the location and Centre of Excellence.
Before applying, please ensure to check our FAQ for important information about eligibility and the application process.

inputs.job_description:
Your Role
As a
Product Intern (f/m/d)
, you'll own your projects from start to finish—diving into our tech, exploring different teams, and making a real impact in a fast-growing fintech.
Product Development
: Work closely with Product Managers and Engineering teams to support the full lifecycle of features — from ideation and user research to go-live. Contribute to both front-end (UX optimizations) and back-end (data flows, dashboards) initiatives.
Strategy & Analysis
: Shape our product strategy with data analysis, reports, and processes. Help translate business goals into actionable tasks and measurable outcomes.
Benchmarking & Research
: Conduct research on competitors, markets, and trends. Present findings in clear visual formats to inform strategic decisions and roadmap priorities.
Collaboration:
Partner with Design, Engineering, Marketing, and Operations teams to drive initiatives forward and ensure smooth delivery of projects.
What you bring
Background
: Currently enrolled in a bachelor’s or master’s program in Economics, Business Informatics, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, preferably with a focus on management, IT, or design.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills
: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with curiosity for data-driven decision making. Comfortable tackling complex problems and breaking them down into actionable steps.
Curiosity
: Passion for fintech, technology, and creating meaningful customer experiences. Motivated to learn by doing and explore new challenges.
Ownership & Initiative
: Proactive, hands-on, able to take ownership of tasks and small projects, and manage multiple priorities effectively.
Communication & Teamwork
: Excellent communication skills, collaborate openly, and build strong relationships across Product, Design, and Engineering teams.
Language Skills
: Fluency in German and English.
Availability
: Full-time availability for minimum 3 months and the ability to travel to the LIQID HQ in Berlin (hybrid working)
Nice to have:
Experience with Linear, Figma, Webflow, JavaScript or other tech/product tools.
Prior experience in start-ups, consulting, or financial services.
We offer
The internship position is available from October 2025.
What we offer
Ownership & Learning
: Real exposure to product development with responsibility to make an impact. You’ll help shape the future of digital wealth management with us in an innovative, multi-award-winning company on a growth trajectory.
Mentorship:
Work with experienced Product Owners, Designers, and Engineers.
Flexible Work & Tools
: Hybrid working options, 28 vacation days and two additional days off on December 24 and 31, high-quality equipment (MacBook, display, headphones) and a supportive environment to balance learning and work.
Culture & Perks:
Collaborative, international, and diverse team, healthy office snacks, monthly lunch allowance, and exclusive employee benefits on investment strategies.
What happens next
Video interview with Felix & Ali
: A casual introduction with two of your future teammates to get to know each other and align expectations for the role. Some skills questions might occur.
Video interview with Louis
: A discussion with your potential team lead to learn more about the product team, your potential projects, and how your skills and interests align with the role.
Offer
LIQID is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to race, age, religion, gender, ethnicity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by equal opportunity laws.
Contact
Don't meet all the requirements? Apply anyway! We look forward to receiving your application!

inputs.job_description:
Einleitung
Starten Sie eine Karriere mit Innovationen, die den Unterschied machen!
Novanta treibt mit seinen Innovationen Technologien voran, die das Gesundheitswesen und die moderne Fertigung verändern, die Produktivität steigern, die Lebensqualität der Menschen verbessern und das Machbare neu definieren. Für unsere Kunden weltweit entwickeln wir technische Komponenten und Subsysteme, die extreme Präzision und Leistung für eine Reihe von unternehmenskritischen Anwendungen bieten – von der minimalinvasiven Chirurgie über die Robotik bis hin zum 3D-Metalldruck.
Novanta ist ein globales Unternehmen mit über 26 Standorten in Nord- und Südamerika, Europa und im asiatisch-pazifischen Raum. Sie suchen einen tollen Arbeitgeber? Sie haben ihn gefunden – mit einer Kultur, in der Teamwork, Zusammenarbeit und Empowerment eine wichtige Rolle spielen. Lernen Sie Novanta kennen.
This position is part of Novanta’s Advanced Surgery business unit. Specialized in the field of Minimally Invasive Medicine, WOM develops devices and accessories so that doctors can operate with small cuts. We produce Cameras, Insufflators, Medical Pumps, and tubing that make diagnosis and treatment easier for everyone. Our insufflators and pump systems dilate cavities in the body and turn previously complicated surgeries into minor procedures. Together with customers, doctors, and technical experts, our teams continuously search for new ways to innovate.
Ihre Aufgaben
Summary:
The Working Student will be responsible for the execution and evaluation of quality and functional tests of insufflation and pump hoses (transport tests, functional tests, tensile strength tests, shelf-life tests, air bubble leak test etc.) including documentation in English language.
Primary Responsibilities:
Generation of scripts (Python) and embedded code (C++) for medical devices
Analysis and correction of software modules in case of simple errors or quality problems
Creation of software documentation
Creation and execution of software tests
Collaboration in the construction of functional models/prototypes
Required Experience, Education, Skills and Competencies:
Bachelorant/Masterant in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or similar
Good technical understanding
Knowledge in the documentation of scientific results
Experience in programming with Phyton and/or C++
Very good knowledge of English
Logical and analytical work
Quality conscious, trustworthy and reliable
Structured and systematic way of working
Wir bieten
Novanta ist stolz darauf, ein Unternehmen zu sein, das sich für Chancengleichheit bei der Beschäftigung und entsprechende Maßnahmen einsetzt. Wir berücksichtigen alle qualifizierten Bewerber ohne Rücksicht auf Hautfarbe, Religion, Geschlecht (einschließlich Schwangerschaft), sexuelle Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität oder -ausdruck, nationale Herkunft, Behinderung oder andere Kategorien, die gesetzlich oder durch Novanta-Richtlinien geschützt sind.
Bitte kontaktieren Sie uns, wenn Sie für irgendeinen Teil des Beschäftigungsprozesses eine behindertengerechte Lösung benötigen.
Werden Sie Mitglied der Novanta Talent Community.

Werde IT-Profi mit Führungsstärke: Du kombinierst Theorie mit Praxis, entwickelst Software, sicherst Netzwerke und gestaltest die digitale Zukunft im öffentlichen Dienst.
Die Deutsche Rentenversicherung Bund ist ein wichtiger Bestandteil der sozialen Absicherung in Deutschland.
IT-Fachkräfte von morgen
Die IT bildet das Rückgrat moderner Arbeitswelten und -prozesse. Deshalb hat die DRV Bund starke IT-Bereiche, in der sowohl klassische Fachinformatiker*innen als auch IT-Spezialist*innen mit einem IT-Studium arbeiten. Dieses bieten wir dir an zwei Hochschulen an.
Dort wirst du zum*zur Expert*in im vernetzten Denken und Handeln und bleibst im ständigen Austausch mit unseren Kund*innen und Kolleg*innen. Schon in den Semesterferien sammelst du bei uns wertvolle Praxiserfahrung. Dank deines Studiums kannst du später in deinem Team Verantwortung übernehmen und eigene Projekte leiten. Dazu gehört die Entwicklung von Softwareanwendungen, die Verwaltung unserer Netzwerke, die Umsetzung von IT-Sicherheitsmaßnahmen und vieles mehr.

eginn:

Administrator*in, Web-Entwickler*in, Frontend-Entwickler*in, Softwarearchitekt*in, u.v.m.

ab sofort

Keine

Die Praxisanteile deines Studiums wie Praxisphasen, Projektarbeiten und die Bachelorarbeit absolvierst du bei der DRV Bund am Standort Berlin.
Informatiker*innen können verschiedene Aufgaben übernehmen – von der Softwareentwicklung bis hin zu IT-Projektmanagement gibt es eine Vielzahl an unterschiedlichen Tätigkeiten.

Beratung? Ja, aber anders! Unsere Kultur macht den Unterschied!
Als unabhängige, internationale Managementberatung begegnen wir täglich spannenden Aufgaben und Kunden. Durch individuelle Stärken und Talente sowie umfassende Expertise wachsen wir über uns hinaus. Wir nehmen Herausforderungen an – als Team auf Augenhöhe. Freundschaftlich und mit Humor. Successfully together! That's Horváth.
Deine Perspektiven bei uns
Internship. Thought ahead.
You are not only part of our team, but also dive right into our challenging consulting projects as well as internal topics around Chemicals & Life Sciences with a focus on strategy, organization & processes, sales, operations, controlling & finance, and digitalization. You support us with your talents and contribute significantly to the team effort right from the beginning, either from the customer’s site, in our offices or flexibly from home. With us you will be heard because new and fresh ideas are the key to success.
Experience growth. Every day.
You want to grow. We promote your individual development through mentoring and open feedback from collegues. With our Students@Horváth initiative, we also offer regular cross-departmental exchange, a network and student trainings - whether virtual or personal.
Career start. Made easy.
We let the numbers do the talking: Over 40% of our Horváths who have joined us in recent years were already with us as students. We reward an outstanding internship with a shortened hiring process for your permanent position or, alternatively, with admission to the Horváth Student Club.
Dein Beitrag zu unserem Team
Hello team player:
You want to learn, gain experience, and expand your expertise. Friendly cooperation and facing challenges together while having fun is as important to you as it is to us. Last but not least: We have a sense of humor – do you too?
Your competencies:
The sky is the limit! You want to get started right away and give us your best every day. You are solution-oriented, highly motivated, independent and like to think outside the box. Confident communication in English and/ or German is a matter of course for you, as is the use of Microsoft Office.
Your academic background:
You would like to finally put your broad knowledge from your studies in the fields of business, economics, chemical engineering or computer science into practice. You are enrolled at a university, bring first practical insights and are available for a period of at least two months.
Benefits
Flexibel arbeiten. Nachhaltig erfolgreich.
Mit unseren Kunden gestalten wir die Welt von morgen. Der Anspruch an unsere Arbeit ist hoch – keine Frage. Wir bieten dir ideale Rahmenbedingungen, um jeden Tag dein Bestes zu geben. Dazu zählt eine moderne agile Arbeitsumgebung in unseren Offices; daneben Remote Work, Homeoffice und On-Site beim Kunden in guter Balance.
Horváth Spirit. Nicht nur fachlich ein Team.
Unser Zusammenhalt ist einzigartig. Als Team treffen wir uns bei vielen Gelegenheiten. Sommer- und Weihnachtsfeste, Get-together an unseren Standorten, Studierendenmeetings oder Networking Events: Wir tauschen uns aus, feiern miteinander, lernen voneinander und sind nicht nur fachlich ein super Team.
Persönlich wachsen. Zukunft gestalten.
Bei uns findest du alles, um nie stillzustehen! Egal, ob regelmäßiges Networking, Mentoring, Feedback oder Seminare: Nutze das Praktikum oder die studentische Tätigkeit bei uns, um wirklich weiter zu kommen.
Werde ein Teil von uns
Als ein Teil von uns zeichnet Dich aus, dass Du zu den Besten Deines Fachs gehörst. Es sind außergewöhnliche Menschen wie Du, die mit ihren Leistungen unsere Erfolgsgeschichte prägen. Unsere Mitarbeitenden machen den Unterschied: In der Arbeit mit unseren Kunden, im Miteinander und Füreinander. Jeden Tag. Deshalb engagieren wir uns, um Dich in Deiner Karriere bei Horváth zu unterstützen. Wir pflegen, was uns auszeichnet – die gemeinsame Kultur des Vertrauens und der Offenheit, des Strebens nach Kompetenz, Innovation und Unternehmertum. Das ist unser Anspruch. Du hast bereits erste praktische Erfahrungen in Data Science gesammelt, bringst eine ausgeprägte Affinität für Technologien mit und stehst für einen Zeitraum von mindestens drei Monaten zur Verfügung.
Benefits
Flexibel arbeiten. Nachhaltig erfolgreich.
Mit unseren Kunden gestalten wir die Welt von morgen. Der Anspruch an unsere Arbeit ist hoch – keine Frage. Wir bieten dir ideale Rahmenbedingungen, um jeden Tag dein Bestes zu geben. Horváth Spirit. Nicht nur fachlich ein Team.

Sommer- und Weihnachtsfeste, Get-together an unseren Standorten, Studierendenmeetings oder Networking Events: Wir tauschen uns aus, feiern miteinander, lernen voneinander und sind nicht nur fachlich ein super Team.
Persönlich wachsen. Zukunft gestalten.
Bei uns findest du alles, um nie stillzustehen! Egal, ob regelmäßiges Networking, Mentoring, Feedback oder Seminare: Nutze das Praktikum oder die studentische Tätigkeit bei uns, um wirklich weiter zu kommen.

Als ein Teil von uns zeichnet Dich aus, dass Du zu den Besten Deines Fachs gehörst. Es sind außergewöhnliche Menschen wie Du, die mit ihren Leistungen unsere Erfolgsgeschichte prägen. Unsere Mitarbeitenden machen den Unterschied: In der Arbeit mit unseren Kunden, im Miteinander und Füreinander. Jeden Tag. Deshalb engagieren wir uns, um Dich in Deiner Karriere bei Horváth zu unterstützen. Wir pflegen, was uns auszeichnet – die gemeinsame Kultur des Vertrauens und der Offenheit, des Strebens nach Kompetenz, Innovation und Unternehmertum. Das ist unser Anspruch.
